user.title: Smart Thermostat - Core entities
user.description: Choose the air conditioner to manage and the base sensors.

data_description.name: Display name shown in Home Assistant. E.g. 'Master bedroom', 'Living room upstairs'.
data_description.climate_entity: The physical AC unit this thermostat will control. Do not choose another smart thermostat.
data_description.temp_sensor: Room temperature probe, ideally placed away from the AC. E.g. a Zigbee sensor.
data_description.window_sensor: Binary sensor that turns 'on' when the window is open. If left open, the AC turns off after a configurable delay.
data_description.presence_sensor: If set and presence is detected continuously, the thermostat can boost the fan after X minutes. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.door_sensor: If set, sends an alert (voice and/or Telegram) when the door opens. Never acts on the AC. Leave empty to disable.

energia.title: Solar and battery
energia.description: Configure FV sensors and automatic turn-on/off parameters. All sensors are optional: leaving them empty disables the solar logic.

data.fv_margin_w: Solar surplus margin required to turn on (W)
data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on (%)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between cascade turn-ons / turn-offs (min)
data.fv_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic turn-off when solar is insufficient (on/off)
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes of insufficient solar before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after window end where turn-off stays active

data_description.fv_sensor: Instantaneous power from the panels. E.g. sensor.solar_production.
data_description.battery_sensor: Battery state of charge in percent. The AC turns on only if SOC exceeds the minimum threshold.
data_description.fv_margin_w: Minimum surplus required to turn on: solar must exceed (consumption + margin). E.g. 1200 W → turns on only if solar > consumption + 1200 W.
data_description.soc_min: The AC won't turn on from solar if the battery is below this percentage. E.g. 70 → turns on only with battery ≥ 70%.
data_description.fv_start_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar before this time. E.g. 10:00.
data_description.fv_end_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar after this time. E.g. 16:00. Automatic turn-off can continue beyond this (see extra hours).
data_description.fv_priority: With multiple thermostats, lower numbers turn on first and turn off last. E.g. bedroom = 10, living = 20, game room = 30 → living turns on first, game room turns off first.
data_description.fv_stagger_minutes: How many minutes to wait between one cascade turn-on (or turn-off) and the next. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: when solar drops below current consumption for the configured delay, the AC turns off. With multiple thermostats the turn-off cascade is the reverse of turn-on (highest priority number = first to turn off).
data_description.fv_shutoff_delay_min: How many minutes solar must stay insufficient before turning off. Avoids shutdowns for passing clouds. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: After the solar window ends, the AC can still be turned off automatically for this many hours. E.g. window ends at 16:00, extra 1h → turn-off active until 17:00.

profilo.title: Regulation profile
profilo.description: Choose a preconfigured profile to apply optimal thermal thresholds automatically, or pick Custom to set them manually.

data_description.profile: Balanced: gradual regulation, recommended for normal use. Aggressive: cools faster, higher fan. Gentle: minimal changes, quiet. Custom: set every threshold manually in the next step.

soglie_termiche.title: Thermal thresholds
soglie_termiche.description: Define how the thermostat reacts to different room temperatures relative to the target.

data.below_offset: Margin below target for low fan (°C)
data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset above target to turn on from solar (°C)
data.temp_delta: Regulation delta applied to the setpoint (°C)

data_description.target_temp_default: Comfort temperature the thermostat aims for. E.g. 25°C. Can be changed anytime from the climate card.
data_description.extreme_offset: Above target + this value: high fan, very low setpoint. E.g. offset 2°C, target 25°C → extreme above 27°C.
data_description.hot_offset: Above target + this value (but below extreme): medium fan, low setpoint. E.g. offset 1.5°C, target 25°C → strong above 26.5°C.
data_description.range_offset: Above target + this value (but below strong): low fan, reduced setpoint. E.g. offset 0.2°C, target 25°C → mild above 25.2°C.
data_description.below_offset: Between target and target - this value: low fan, setpoint = target. E.g. offset 0.1°C → band 24.9–25°C.
data_description.turn_on_offset: The AC turns on from solar only if room temp > target + this. E.g. 0.8°C, target 25°C → turns on only above 25.8°C.
data_description.temp_delta: How much the setpoint sent to the AC is lowered in warm/strong bands. E.g. delta 1°C, target 25°C → sends 24°C to the AC.
data_description.extreme_delta: Like temp_delta but for the extreme band. E.g. delta 2°C, target 25°C → sends 23°C in extreme heat.

soglie_avanzate.title: Advanced functions
soglie_avanzate.description: Internal sensor calibration, night mode, night turn-off, presence boost and timing.

data.min_below_internal: Minimum setpoint margin below AC internal sensor (°C)
data.night_offset: Night target offset: effective target = target + this value (°C)
data.night_ac_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-on when too hot (on/off)
data.night_turn_on_offset: Night turn-on threshold: turns on if temp > night target + this value (°C)
data.night_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-off when room is at target temperature (on/off)
data.night_shutoff_delta: Tolerance above night target to consider the room 'at temperature' (°C)
data.night_shutoff_min: Consecutive minutes at temperature before night turn-off
data.presence_boost_enabled: ▶ Fan boost if continuous presence detected and still warm (on/off)
data.presence_boost_minutes: Continuous presence minutes before fan boost
data.presence_boost_offset: Minimum offset above target to trigger presence boost (°C)
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes with window open before turning off the AC

data_description.calibration_max_offset: The AC's internal sensor often reads differently from the room. The thermostat lowers the setpoint to compensate, but by at most this many degrees. E.g. 3°C → corrects at most 3°C even if the difference is larger.
data_description.min_below_internal: In active heat bands, the setpoint always stays at least this far below what the AC's own sensor reads, ensuring the compressor doesn't stop prematurely. E.g. 1°C → if AC reads 24°C, setpoint never exceeds 23°C.
data_description.night_start_time: Night mode starts at this time. The window can span midnight. E.g. 23:00.
data_description.night_end_time: Night mode ends at this time. E.g. 07:00.
data_description.night_offset: At night the effective target becomes target + this value. E.g. target 25°C, offset 1°C → night target 26°C. Set 0 to keep the same target.
data_description.night_ac_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room exceeds night target + the turn-on threshold, the AC turns on automatically without needing solar surplus.
data_description.night_turn_on_offset: Night automatic turn-on threshold. E.g. target 25°C, night offset 1°C → night target 26°C. With turn-on offset 1.5°C → turns on automatically only above 27.5°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room stays at temperature for the configured minutes, the AC turns off automatically. Works with any turn-on method (manual, solar or night auto).
data_description.night_shutoff_delta: Tolerance above night target. E.g. night target 26°C, delta 0.3°C → 'at temperature' when temp ≤ 26.3°C. If temp rises above 26.3°C the timer resets.
data_description.night_shutoff_min: Consecutive minutes at temperature before shutting off. E.g. 30 min → if temp rises during those 30 minutes, the count resets to zero.
data_description.presence_boost_enabled: If enabled: when presence is detected continuously for the configured minutes and the room is still above target + offset, the fan is raised to medium.
data_description.presence_boost_minutes: Continuous presence minutes before the fan boost. E.g. 10 minutes.
data_description.presence_boost_offset: Boost only if temp > target + this. E.g. 1°C → boost only if still above 26°C with target 25°C.
data_description.window_delay_minutes: How many minutes to wait after the window opens before turning off. Useful for brief openings. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often the thermostat recalculates and updates the AC. E.g. 5 minutes.

notifiche.title: Voice and Telegram alerts
notifiche.description: Configure Google devices for voice announcements and Telegram messages. Messages support Jinja2 template variables.

data.tts_media_players: Google / media_player devices for voice announcements
data.tts_message_open: Voice message when window is open
data.notify_targets: Notify entities to send messages to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if no notify entity selected)
data.notify_message: Message sent when AC is turned off due to open window
data.notify_temp_change_enabled: ▶ Send Telegram notification on every AC temperature change (on/off)
data.notify_temp_change_message: Message sent on each AC temperature change
data.door_alert_tts: ▶ Door alert via Google Home voice (on/off)
data.door_alert_message: Message sent when the door opens

data_description.tts_media_players: Select one or more Google Home / Nest or media_player devices for voice announcements. E.g. media_player.google_bedroom.
data_description.tts_engine_entity: TTS engine to use. Leave empty to use the first one available in Home Assistant.
data_description.tts_message_open: Variables: {{ delay }} wait minutes, {{ name }} thermostat name, {{ target }} target temp. E.g. 'Window open! Turning off AC in {{ delay }} minutes.'
data_description.notify_targets: Select configured notify entities in HA (e.g. notify.telegram_me). These receive all thermostat messages.
data_description.notify_chat_ids: Alternative to notify entities: enter Telegram chat IDs separated by commas. Used only if no notify entity is selected above.
data_description.notify_message: Message when AC is turned off due to open window. Variables: {{ name }}, {{ target }}.
data_description.notify_temp_change_enabled: If enabled: every time the thermostat sends a new setpoint to the AC, a Telegram message arrives with details. Useful for monitoring but can be verbose.
data_description.notify_temp_change_message: Variables: {{ name }}, {{ old_temp }}, {{ new_temp }}, {{ fan_mode }}, {{ room_temp }}, {{ target }}.
data_description.door_alert_enabled: Master switch for door alerts. If disabled, the voice and Telegram toggles below are ignored.
data_description.door_alert_tts: If enabled: plays the door alert message on the configured Google devices when the door opens. Requires door alert to be enabled.
data_description.door_alert_notify: If enabled: sends the door alert message on Telegram when the door opens. Requires door alert to be enabled. Voice and Telegram are independent.
data_description.door_alert_message: Variable: {{ name }}. Informational only: never turns off the AC or changes its settings.

abort.already_configured: This air conditioner is already managed by another Smart Thermostat instance.

sensori.title: Entities and sensors
sensori.description: Update the controlled AC and connected sensors.

data_description.name: Display name shown in Home Assistant. E.g. 'Master bedroom', 'Living room upstairs'.
data_description.temp_sensor: Room temperature probe, ideally placed away from the AC.
data_description.window_sensor: Binary sensor that turns 'on' when the window is open. If left open, the AC turns off after a delay.
data_description.presence_sensor: If set and presence is detected continuously, the thermostat can boost the fan after X minutes. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.door_sensor: If set, sends an alert when the door opens. Never acts on the AC. Leave empty to disable.

data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on (%)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between cascade turn-ons / turn-offs (min)
data.fv_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic turn-off when solar is insufficient (on/off)
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes of insufficient solar before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after window end where turn-off stays active

data_description.fv_sensor: Instantaneous power from the panels. E.g. sensor.solar_production.
data_description.battery_sensor: Battery state of charge in percent. The AC turns on only if SOC exceeds the minimum threshold.
data_description.fv_margin_w: Minimum surplus required to turn on: solar must exceed (consumption + margin). E.g. 1200 W → turns on only if solar > consumption + 1200 W.
data_description.soc_min: The AC won't turn on from solar if the battery is below this percentage. E.g. 70 → turns on only with battery ≥ 70%.
data_description.fv_start_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar before this time. E.g. 10:00.
data_description.fv_end_time: The AC won't turn on automatically from solar after this time. Turn-off can continue beyond this (see extra hours).
data_description.fv_priority: Lower numbers turn on first and turn off last. E.g. bedroom = 10, living = 30 → bedroom turns on first, living turns off first.

data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: when solar drops below current consumption for the configured delay, the AC turns off. Cascade is the reverse of turn-on (highest priority number = first to turn off).

data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: After the solar window ends, the AC can still be turned off for this many hours. E.g. window ends at 16:00, extra 1h → turn-off active until 17:00.

data_description.profile: Balanced: gradual regulation, recommended for normal use. Aggressive: cools faster. Gentle: minimal changes, quiet. Custom: set every threshold manually in the next step.

data.below_offset: Margin below target for low fan (°C)
data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset above target to turn on from solar (°C)
data.temp_delta: Regulation delta applied to the setpoint (°C)

data_description.target_temp_default: Comfort temperature. E.g. 25°C. Changeable anytime from the climate card.
data_description.extreme_offset: Above target + this: high fan, very low setpoint. E.g. offset 2°C, target 25°C → extreme above 27°C.
data_description.hot_offset: Above target + this (but below extreme): medium fan, low setpoint. E.g. offset 1.5°C, target 25°C → strong above 26.5°C.
data_description.range_offset: Above target + this (but below strong): low fan, reduced setpoint. E.g. offset 0.2°C, target 25°C → mild above 25.2°C.
data_description.below_offset: Between target and target - this: low fan, setpoint = target. E.g. offset 0.1°C → band 24.9–25°C.
data_description.turn_on_offset: Turns on from solar only if room > target + this. E.g. 0.8°C, target 25°C → turns on only above 25.8°C.
data_description.temp_delta: How much the setpoint is lowered in warm/strong bands. E.g. delta 1°C, target 25°C → sends 24°C to AC.

soglie_avanzate.title: Advanced functions
soglie_avanzate.description: Calibration, night mode, night turn-off, presence boost and timing.

data.min_below_internal: Minimum setpoint margin below AC internal sensor (°C)
data.night_offset: Night target offset: effective target = target + this value (°C)
data.night_ac_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-on when too hot (on/off)
data.night_turn_on_offset: Night turn-on threshold: turns on if temp > night target + this value (°C)
data.night_shutoff_enabled: ▶ Automatic night turn-off when room is at target temperature (on/off)
data.night_shutoff_delta: Tolerance above night target to consider room 'at temperature' (°C)
data.night_shutoff_min: Consecutive minutes at temperature before night turn-off
data.presence_boost_enabled: ▶ Fan boost if continuous presence and still warm (on/off)
data.presence_boost_minutes: Continuous presence minutes before fan boost
data.presence_boost_offset: Minimum offset above target to trigger presence boost (°C)
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes with window open before turning off the AC

data_description.calibration_max_offset: The AC's internal sensor often reads differently from the room. The thermostat lowers the setpoint to compensate, but by at most this many degrees. E.g. 3°C.
data_description.min_below_internal: In active heat bands, the setpoint always stays at least this far below the AC's own reading. Ensures the compressor doesn't stop prematurely. E.g. 1°C → if AC reads 24°C, setpoint never exceeds 23°C.
data_description.night_start_time: Night mode starts at this time. Can span midnight. E.g. 23:00.
data_description.night_end_time: Night mode ends at this time. E.g. 07:00.
data_description.night_offset: At night the effective target becomes target + this. E.g. target 25°C, offset 1°C → night target 26°C. Set 0 to keep the same target.
data_description.night_ac_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room exceeds night target + the turn-on threshold, the AC turns on automatically without solar surplus.
data_description.night_turn_on_offset: E.g. target 25°C, night offset 1°C → night target 26°C. Turn-on offset 1.5°C → turns on only above 27.5°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_enabled: If enabled: at night, if the room stays at temperature for the configured minutes, the AC turns off automatically. Works with any turn-on method.
data_description.night_shutoff_delta: E.g. night target 26°C, delta 0.3°C → 'at temperature' when temp ≤ 26.3°C. If temp rises above 26.3°C the timer resets.
data_description.night_shutoff_min: E.g. 30 min → if temp rises during those 30 minutes, the count resets to zero.
data_description.presence_boost_enabled: If enabled: when presence is detected continuously for the configured minutes and room is still above target + offset, fan is raised to medium.
data_description.presence_boost_minutes: E.g. 10 minutes of continuous presence before boost.
data_description.presence_boost_offset: Boost only if temp > target + this. E.g. 1°C → boost only if still above 26°C with target 25°C.
data_description.window_delay_minutes: How many minutes to wait after the window opens before turning off. E.g. 5 minutes.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often the thermostat recalculates and updates the AC. E.g. 5 minutes.

notifiche.title: Voice and Telegram alerts
notifiche.description: Configure Google devices and Telegram messages. Messages support template variables.

data.tts_media_players: Google / media_player devices for voice announcements
data.tts_message_open: Voice message when window is open
data.notify_targets: Notify entities to send messages to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if no notify entity selected)
data.notify_message: Message sent when AC is turned off due to open window
data.notify_temp_change_enabled: ▶ Send Telegram notification on every AC temperature change (on/off)
data.notify_temp_change_message: Message sent on each AC temperature change
data.door_alert_tts: ▶ Door alert via Google Home voice (on/off)
data.door_alert_message: Message sent when the door opens

data_description.tts_media_players: Select Google Home / Nest or media_player devices for voice. E.g. media_player.google_bedroom.
data_description.tts_engine_entity: TTS engine to use. Leave empty for auto-detection.
data_description.tts_message_open: Variables: {{ delay }}, {{ name }}, {{ target }}. E.g. 'Window open! Turning off in {{ delay }} minutes.'
data_description.notify_targets: Configured notify entities in HA. Receive all thermostat messages.
data_description.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs separated by commas. Used only if no notify entity selected above.
data_description.notify_temp_change_enabled: If enabled: every new setpoint sent to the AC generates a Telegram message. Useful for monitoring but can be verbose.
data_description.notify_temp_change_message: Variables: {{ name }}, {{ old_temp }}, {{ new_temp }}, {{ fan_mode }}, {{ room_temp }}, {{ target }}.
data_description.door_alert_enabled: Master switch. If disabled, voice and Telegram toggles below are ignored.
data_description.door_alert_tts: If enabled: plays the door alert on Google devices when door opens. Requires door alert enabled.
data_description.door_alert_notify: If enabled: sends door alert on Telegram when door opens. Requires door alert enabled. Voice and Telegram are independent.
data_description.door_alert_message: Variable: {{ name }}. Informational only: never turns off the AC.
